description: Project-specific configuration for agent framework. Copied to .agent-state/ when creating worktrees. CUSTOMIZE THIS FILE FOR YOUR PROJECT.

branching_strategy.description: Defines the promotion path for feature branches and which branch gets code review.
branching_strategy.notes: feature branches are created from default_branch. PRs to code_review_branch get full review. PRs to promotion_branches are promotions (already reviewed).

jira_statuses.description: Maps logical workflow states to your Jira project's actual status names. Agents use these to transition tickets.

release.notes: Pattern for Jira fix versions. PROJECT is replaced with jira.project_key. Append .N for multiple releases per day.

ui_testing.description: Configuration for UI Test agent. Run /ui-test to start setup wizard if not configured.

wait_strategies.notes: Set custom_loading_selector if your app has a unique loading indicator
